zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Bowyer I於1525年出生在英國素可其斯特時，他的父親Robert Bowyer26歲，母親Margaret Anna Groves25歲。他於1554年12月31日與Elizabeth Tyllesworth在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1581年6月14日在英國巴金哈姆爾丹納姆享年56歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Bowyer I于1525年出生在英国素可其斯特时，他的父亲Robert Bowyer26岁，母亲Margaret Anna Groves25岁。他于1554年12月31日与Elizabeth Tyllesworth在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1581年6月14日在英国巴金哈姆爾丹納姆享年56岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Bowyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

variants.name: Bowman
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for an archer, hunter or soldier armed with a bow, from Middle English bow(e)man, bouman (from Old English boga ‘bow’ + mann ‘man’). This word was distinguished from Bowyer , which denoted a maker or seller of bows.
Americanized form of German   Baumann   or the Dutch cognate   Bouwman  .

variants.name: Bouyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Frederique, Monique, Napoleon.
French (southern): regional variant of   Bouvier  . Compare   Beyea  .

variants.name: Boyers
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Bowyer I was born in 1525, in Chichester, Sussex, England, his father, Robert Bowyer, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Anna Groves, was 25. He married Elizabeth Tyllesworth on 31 December 1554, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 14 June 1581, in Denham, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Bowyer I est né en 1525, à Chichester, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bowyer, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Anna Groves, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tyllesworth le 31 décembre 1554, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1581, à Denham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Bowyer I 1525 in Chichester, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Bowyer 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Anna Groves 25. Er hat am 31. Dezember 1554 in London, Middlesex, England Elizabeth Tyllesworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juni 1581 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Denham, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Bowyer I è nato il nel 1525 nel Chichester, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Robert Bowyer, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Anna Groves, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Tyllesworth il 31 dicembre 1554, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 giugno 1581, nel Denham, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Bowyer Iが1525年にイギリススセックスチチェスターで生まれた時，父Robert Bowyerは26歳，母Margaret Anna Grovesは25歳であった。1554年12月31日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでElizabeth Tyllesworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1581年6月14日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアデンハムで56歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Bowyer I(이)가 1525년 영국 수세스 치체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bowyer(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Anna Groves(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1554년 12월 31일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Elizabeth Tyllesworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1581년 6월 14일 영국 벅잉함실르 데함에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Bowyer I nasceu em 1525, em Chichester, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Bowyer, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Anna Groves, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tyllesworth em 31 de dezembro de 1554, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1581, em Denham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Bowyer I родился в 1525 г. в местности шичестир, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Bowyer было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Anna Groves, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tyllesworth 31 декабря 1554 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 июня 1581 г. в местности денам, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Bowyer I nació en 1525, en Chichester, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Bowyer, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Anna Groves, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Tyllesworth el 31 de diciembre de 1554, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de junio de 1581, en Denham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
